assertions.assertion: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertions.evidence: Adopt a testing framework like Jest or Mocha to standardize tests (Medium term)

assertions.assertion: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
Output must include at least one improvement item
